title: psychotria rubiginosa var. rubiginosa
intro: Psychotria rubiginosa var. rubiginosa, commonly known as 'Red Bead', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in folk medicine. The plant contains alkaloids and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Psychotria rubiginosa var. rubiginosa are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or made into tinctures and capsules for medicinal purposes.
